new_cascade_issues.title: Power margin reduction
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces power generation capacity, potentially exceeding peak power consumption limits during imaging mode.

new_cascade_issues.title: Thermal gradient margin reduction
new_cascade_issues.description: The removal of the right solar panel may alter thermal distribution and reduce the thermal margin on the optical bench, potentially violating the ΔT ≤ 15°C requirement.

new_cascade_issues.title: Structural balance alteration
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel changes the mass distribution, potentially affecting structural dynamics and stability.

new_cascade_issues.title: Mechanical stress redistribution
new_cascade_issues.description: The removal of the right solar panel may redistribute mechanical stresses, requiring reanalysis and potential testing to ensure structural integrity.

new_missing_tests.activity: Shock test per launcher SRS ICD
new_missing_tests.reason: The removal of the right solar panel may affect shock response, necessitating retesting to validate structural integrity.

new_missing_tests.activity: Thermal balance test to validate TMM
new_missing_tests.reason: The thermal distribution may be altered, requiring a new thermal balance test to ensure compliance with ΔT limits.
